quoted_tweet.text:
$VELO l @veloprotocol  

Just read more details on the blog and this part sounds interesting to me..

How $VELO Captures Value?

$VELO is not a payment token.

It is the coordination asset that ties the whole network together, and it accrues value through three core functions.

Settlement Gas
============
Every FX and settlement transaction on Velo pays a small fee in $VELO. A percentage of those fees is used to buy $VELO back from the open market - creating a deflationary loop where higher transaction volume directly translates into higher demand and reduced circulating supply.

Liquidity Staking
=============
LPs stake $VELO to participate in the network's transaction flow, provide depth on USDT and FX pairs, and earn yield from spreads and routing fees. More volume on the network means more LPs competing for flow, which means more $VELO staked - locking supply and aligning LP incentives with network growth.

Net Settlement Collateral
====================
At scale, institutional participants lock $VELO as collateral to access the netting layer, enabling credit lines and capital-efficient settlement. This creates long-term lockup and institutional-grade utility.

$VELO is consumed, locked, and reserved - and demand scales directly with real network activity. 

$VELO demand is not speculative. It is programmatically tied to volume, capital, and treasury usage across the network.

author.name: Pure8

kept.text:
This is the part most people skip over when looking at $VELO.

The token is not just along for the ride. It is the engine.

Every transaction generates fees. Those fees trigger automatic buybacks. LPs stake to earn from network flow. Institutions lock $VELO as collateral to access the settlement layer.

Consumed. Locked. Reserved.

Three mechanisms working simultaneously to reduce supply while demand scales directly with real network volume.

This is not a token hoping adoption follows. This is a token mathematically designed to capture value as the network grows.

That's the difference between speculation and infrastructure.

@veloprotocol 👏👏👏

kept.text:
$VELO: Arun Jeldi letter to shareholders in company's Annual Report

- "We exited the year with a record backlog of $31 million, nearly double the $16 million at the close of 2024, built on the strongest quarterly bookings in our company's history. This backlog is expected to convert within the next twelve months."

- "We also won a multiyear, $11.5 million full-rate production contract with a major defense prime contractor, a clear signal that our technology has moved beyond development and into mission-critical, volume manufacturing."

- "On the commercial side, our partnership with Intergalactic, a GE Aerospace company, demonstrated the speed and precision of our platform by going from design to printed IN718 microtube heat exchanger headers in a matter of weeks. These wins underscore a central theme: Velo3D's technology is becoming essential infrastructure for customers who require speed, quality, and resilience in their supply chains."

- "Looking ahead, the demand signals are clear. Programs that begin with a single system are expanding to multiple systems, sometimes within months, creating a compounding growth dynamic. Based on the contracts we have secured and the trajectory we are seeing across our customer base, we have developed a long-term capacity plan envisioning up to approximately 400 production systems over the next decade."

- "Beyond the near term, we see Velo3D evolving into something larger than a hardware company. Every build, every part, and every material input across our growing fleet generates high-value manufacturing data"

- "Velo3D is positioned at the intersection of two powerful forces: the reindustrialization of critical supply chains and the rapid adoption of additive manufacturing at production scale. We intend to be at the forefront of this transformation."

https://t.co/EX85PrfkiP

quoted_tweet.text:
$VELO CEO인 아룬 젤디가 주주들에게 보내는 연례 보고서에 대한 편지 내용 요약 입니다.

1. 수주 증가
전년대비 약 2배 늘어난 주문 잔고. 즉, 앞으로의 매출이 늘고 있다는 이야기 입니다.

2. 방산 분야 계약 본격적으로 진입
1,150만 달러의 계약으로 실제 생산 단계에 진입 했습니다.

3. GE Aerospace 협업
설계부터 생산까지 몇 주 내 완료 될 예정이고, 속도와 정밀도는 이미 입증 되었다고 합니다.

4. 고객의 패턴이 바뀌는 중
예전에는 장비 1대만 테스트 했다면 지금은 여러 대로 확장된 상황. 써보니까 좋아서 더 쓴다는 뜻 입니다.

5. 회사의 장기 전략
10년간 400대 생산 시스템을 목표로 한다고 하는데 이건 대량 제조 인프라를 구축하려고 한다는 이야기 입니다. 그래서 이전에 말씀드린 유상증자가 악재가 아니라 오히려 매출을 늘릴 수 있는 발판이 될 것 같다는 이야기를 드렸습니다.

6. 사업 비즈니스 모델의 변화
예전에는 장비를 판매하여 돈을 벌었지만 이제는 직접 제조하여 판매하는 주문 제작 및 설계 시스템 운영

이제는 실적의 턴어라운드가 확실해지면 주가는 기대감을 넘어 확신을 보여주는 주가로 상승할 수 있는 상황 입니다.

quoted_tweet.text:
MUSK PAY TIED TO MARS COLONY AND SPACE DATA CENTERS

SpaceX has tied Elon Musk’s pay to bold goals like building a Mars colony and space-based data centers. He could earn massive share awards if the company hits a $7.5 trillion valuation and establishes a million-person presence on Mars, along with major computing capacity in orbit.

He gets nothing unless these targets are met and currently earns only a minimal salary. The plan is highly unusual and may create tension with Tesla, as both companies compete for his attention.

IMPORTANTE: antes de mover los sliders, lee la explicación completa.

No predice precio.

Es un modelo para construir escenarios según:

• adopción de mercado
• supply vendor real
• supply útil máximo
• retención institucional
• rotación dinámica
• RWA, IA agents, colateral, lending y pagos

si el float cambia,
la velocidad también cambia.
